attributes.action: Lower tax on all fuels until the current crisis is over to 25% not 75%
attributes.additional_details: The people of this country have suffered for far too long we now get taxed on everything and the only people benefiting from the tax is the government the taxes we pay aren't going back in to circulation and helping the British people.  The major companies get exemptions while we suffer to get to work and feed our families it can't go on any longer
attributes.background: The government needs to immediately the remove 75% tax or reduce tax to no more than 20% of gas electricity petrol diesel and all fuels to keep the country moving and prevent further damage to the economy and the current cost of living crisis the people are currently facing.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674

Cut Fuel Duty by the Amount of Extra VAT Gained During Rapid Fuel Increases
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764898

Reduce fuel duty and remove VAT on petrol and diesel
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764175

Remove the VAT element of tax from the cost of fuel at the pump
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764916
